seoIntro.title: A free SVG library for crafts, design, and everyday projects
seoIntro.description: 5SVG is a free SVG resource site: logos, icons, and vector files you can browse and download. Search by name or category, grab the file you need, and save favorites — no account required.

seoBlocks.whatBody: SVG (Scalable Vector Graphics) stores shapes and paths as math instead of pixels. That means logos and icons stay crisp whether you shrink them for a sticker or enlarge them for a poster.
seoBlocks.whatB1: Scales to any size without getting blurry
seoBlocks.whatB2: Common format for logos, icons, and simple illustrations
seoBlocks.whatB3: Supported by browsers, design software, and vinyl cutters
seoBlocks.whatAlt: 5SVG — millions of high-quality SVG vectors and categories
seoBlocks.usesTitle: What can you do with SVG files?
seoBlocks.usesBody: SVGs are a practical starting point for personal projects — mockups, learning design, party crafts, and maker workflows where you need a clean vector you can resize.
seoBlocks.usesB1: Cut vinyl decals with Cricut or Silhouette
seoBlocks.usesB2: Drop icons into Canva, Figma, or PowerPoint
seoBlocks.usesB3: Print shirts, tags, and party decorations at home
seoBlocks.usesB4: Build mood boards and school projects with real brand logos
seoBlocks.usesAlt: 5SVG — design, build, and present with UI kits and app icons
seoBlocks.getTitle: How to get SVG files from 5SVG
seoBlocks.getBody: Everything in the library is free to browse. Open the library from the menu, search by name or pick a category, then copy or download the SVG file to your device.
seoBlocks.getB1: Browse or search — no signup required
seoBlocks.getB2: Click a logo to copy SVG code or download the file
seoBlocks.getB3: Use the heart icon to save favorites on this device
seoBlocks.getB4: Check each brand's official guidelines before commercial use

faq.title: Common questions
faq.subtitle: SVG basics, downloads, and how the library works.
faq.lead: 5SVG is built for quick browsing: search thousands of logos, open a file, and download or copy SVG in one click. Everything below is free — no account, no paywall.
faq.a1: Yes. Browse, search, and download at no cost. Logos and trademarks belong to their owners — use them responsibly for personal, educational, and mockup work.
faq.q2: What is the difference between SVG and PNG?
faq.a2: PNG is pixel-based and can look soft when enlarged. SVG is vector-based and stays sharp at any size — better for logos, icons, and cutting machines.
faq.q3: Can I use these SVGs with Cricut or Silhouette?
faq.a3: Yes. Download the SVG, then import it into Cricut Design Space, Silhouette Studio, or any app that accepts vector files.
faq.a4: No. Browse and download without signing up. Favorites are stored locally in your browser on this device.
